rationale_source: F1.LA multi-tier resolution: broker_correction > docs > derived; major discrepancy triggers R11-B-1 Layer 1 suppression + F2.DH activation

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction asserts $320k; loan_app $245k is SUPPRESSED per R11-B-1 Layer 1 (30.6% discrepancy from broker). Derived-from-LTV ($390k from 60% × $650k) is implicit signal not in canonical_map. F1.LA resolves to broker_correction tier.

discrepancyHold.rationale: Broker $320k vs loan_app $245k = 30.6% discrepancy → R11-B-1 Layer 1 suppression + F2.DH activation.

outbound_emails.rationale: F2.PD SUPPRESSED by F2.DH ACTIVE per R10-F symmetric coverage.

must_not_include.rationale: Suppressed loan_app value (R11-B-1 Layer 1) must NOT appear as canonical.
